about-mission-description: From the first idea to a finished website - and beyond. We take care of everything so you can focus on what you do best: running your business.
about-mission-feat-everything-desc: Contact forms, SEO, analytics, admin panel - everything you need comes ready out of the box. No extra charges for basic features.
about-mission-feat-growth-desc: Start small and add features as you grow. Need a blog? An online store? Multi-language support? We'll add it when you're ready.
about-mission-feat-support-desc: Got a question? Need a change? We respond within 8 hours and fix issues fast. You're never left on your own.
about-mission-feat-websites-desc: We design and build modern, mobile-friendly websites that make your business look professional and help you attract new customers.
about-start-subtitle: We're a team of passionate designers and developers from Poland. We help businesses like yours get online quickly with beautiful, fast websites - without the usual headaches and sky-high costs.
about-story-text-1: We started Nucleify because we saw the same problem over and over: businesses spending too much time and money on websites that didn't deliver results. Small business owners were stuck between expensive agencies and cheap templates that all looked the same.
about-story-text-2: So we built something different - a system of ready-made, tested components that we can combine to create unique websites in days instead of months. The result? Professional websites at a fair price, delivered fast, with ongoing support included. That's our promise.
about-value-cost-desc: You know exactly what you pay for. Transparent pricing, clear contracts, and no surprise invoices. What we quote is what you pay.
about-value-listen-desc: Before we do anything, we understand your business, your goals, and your customers. Your vision drives everything we build.
about-value-partnership-desc: We don't disappear after launch. We stay by your side with updates, improvements, and support for as long as you need us.
about-value-quality-desc: Every website we deliver is thoroughly tested on all devices and browsers. We obsess over details so your customers get a flawless experience.
about-value-security-desc: We protect your website and your customers' data with modern security practices. Sleep well knowing everything is secure.
about-value-speed-desc: Your website ready in days, not months. We know your time is valuable, so we don't believe in endless waiting.
about-values-description: Working with us means working with people who treat your project like their own. Here's what you can count on.
contact-text: Let's talk about how we can bring your vision to life.
dev-description: Nucleify gives you a full-stack, modular monorepo built on Nuxt 3, Vue 3, Laravel 12, and TypeScript - so you ship faster without sacrificing code quality.
dev-dx-api-desc: Typed API resources and form requests keep frontend and backend perfectly in sync.
dev-dx-atomic-desc: Components organized by atoms, molecules, and organisms for scalable, consistent UIs.
dev-dx-docker-desc: Docker Compose brings up the entire stack. No local dependencies needed.
dev-dx-hmr-desc: Hot module replacement for both Nuxt and Laravel - see changes in real time without losing state.
dev-dx-testing-desc: Pest for PHP, Vitest for TS - with factories, mocks, and coverage reports.
dev-dx-types-desc: Shared interfaces between Vue and Laravel eliminate runtime errors before they happen.
dev-feature-atomic-desc: Components structured as atoms, molecules, and organisms for scalable, consistent UIs.
dev-feature-modules-desc: Self-contained modules you can plug in, configure, and override without touching the core.
dev-feature-pagebuilder-desc: Compose pages from ready-made sections and components - drag, drop, ship.
dev-header: Build modern web apps with production-ready architecture
dev-hl-backoffice-desc: Get a fully functional admin panel out of the box - user management, CRUD dashboards, role permissions, and audit logs ready from day one.
dev-hl-backoffice-p2: Auto-generated CRUD for every entity module
dev-hl-backoffice-p3: Built-in activity log and data export
dev-hl-overrides-desc: Extend or replace any module behavior without patching the source. Your customizations live in a separate layer and survive every update.
dev-hl-overrides-p1: Override controllers, models, and views per module
dev-hl-overrides-p2: Custom logic preserved across framework upgrades
dev-hl-overrides-p3: Merge strategies for configs, routes, and middleware
dev-hl-responsive-desc: Every component and page is designed mobile-first. Responsive breakpoints, adaptive navigation, and touch-friendly interactions are baked in.
dev-hl-responsive-p1: Fluid grids and container queries throughout
dev-hl-responsive-p2: Adaptive navbar with drawer and gestures
dev-hl-responsive-p3: Optimized for performance on low-end devices
dev-hl-theming-desc: Switch between light and dark mode, generate palettes on the fly, and let users personalize their interface - all synced to the database.
dev-hl-theming-p1: Runtime palette generation from any seed color
dev-hl-theming-p2: User-specific theme preferences stored per account
dev-hl-theming-p3: Smooth transitions with zero layout shift
dev-mod-auth: Full authentication flow with sessions, tokens, and role-based access.
dev-mod-charts: Configurable charts powered by Chart.js with reactive data binding.
dev-mod-colors: Design tokens and palette generation across light and dark themes.
dev-mod-docs: Markdown-powered documentation with search, sidebar navigation, and versioning.
dev-mod-entities: CRUD scaffolding with models, migrations, controllers, and API resources.
dev-mod-files: Upload, validate, preview, and manage files with storage drivers.
dev-mod-more-desc: Explore all available modules on GitHub.
dev-mod-pagebuilder: Visual page composition from ready-made sections, blocks, and layouts.
dev-modules-desc: Every module is self-contained - drop it in, configure it, and use it immediately.
error-404-message: The page you're looking for seems to have wandered off into the digital void. Let's get you back on track!
features-content-description: Simple admin panel lets you edit text, swap images, and publish changes instantly. No developer needed - you're in full control.
features-conversion-description: Strategic design that guides users to take action. Every element is crafted to maximize engagement and drive conversions.
features-performance-description: Optimized for speed from the ground up. Faster sites rank higher on Google and keep visitors engaged. Every millisecond counts.
features-support-description: We don't leave you alone after launch. We respond fast, fix issues, and keep everything updated - so you can focus on running your business.
features-support-msg-1-text: Logo has been updated on the homepage
features-support-msg-2-text: Offer subpage is ready for preview
features-support-msg-3-text: SSL certificate has been renewed successfully
form-consent-tooltip: Your data is processed by Atomic IT sp. z o.o.
form-validation-consent-required: You must accept the data processing
form-validation-email-invalid: Please enter a valid email address
form-validation-email-max: Email must be less than {count} characters
form-validation-website-type-invalid: Please select a valid website type
form-website-type-help: I don't know / I need help
form-website-type-label: What type of website are you interested in?
home-description: A clear, fast website designed to get real people to contact you. We follow you step by step and put something serious online that truly represents your business.
home-feature-fast-desc: optimized for speed, SEO, and user experience
home-feature-save-desc: cut development costs with ready-to-use solutions
home-feature-secure-desc: your data is safe, your site always online
home-header: Build Your Online Presence That Converts Visitors Into Clients
home-note: Ready to accelerate your project? Let's build something extraordinary together!
home-social-proof: Start growing your business online today
innovations-structure-description: Utilizing Atomic Design principles to develop dynamic, modular solutions that enhance scalability and ensure seamless integration in your development processes.
legal-cookies-analytics-text: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting anonymous usage data.
legal-cookies-contact-text: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at privacy{'@'}nucleify.io or write to Atomic IT sp. z o.o., ul. Gospodarcza 24/25, 20-213 Lublin, Poland.
legal-cookies-essential-text: Required for the website to function properly. These cannot be disabled.
legal-cookies-functional-text: Remember your preferences such as language, theme, and display settings.
legal-cookies-manage-text: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of our website. Most browsers allow you to refuse or accept cookies, delete existing cookies, and set preferences for certain websites.
legal-cookies-third-party-text: Some cookies are placed by third-party services that appear on our pages, such as analytics providers. We do not control these cookies and recommend reviewing the privacy policies of these third-party services.
legal-cookies-types-text: We use the following categories of cookies on our website:
legal-cookies-what-text: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide you with a better experience by remembering your preferences and understanding how you use our site.
legal-gdpr-basis-consent: Your explicit consent (e.g., when submitting a contact form or subscribing to newsletters)
legal-gdpr-basis-contract: Performance of a contract (e.g., when providing our web development services)
legal-gdpr-basis-interest: Legitimate interest (e.g., improving our services and website security)
legal-gdpr-basis-legal: Compliance with legal obligations (e.g., tax and accounting requirements)
legal-gdpr-controller-text: The data controller responsible for your personal data is Atomic IT sp. z o.o., ul. Gospodarcza 24/25, 20-213 Lublin, Poland, NIP: 9462749033. You can contact us at privacy{'@'}nucleify.io.
legal-gdpr-dpo-text: For any GDPR-related inquiries or to exercise your rights, please contact us at privacy{'@'}nucleify.io or write to Atomic IT sp. z o.o., ul. Gospodarcza 24/25, 20-213 Lublin, Poland. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Polish Data Protection Authority (UODO).
legal-gdpr-intro-text: Atomic IT sp. z o.o. (operating as Nucleify) is committed to compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR). This page explains how we process personal data and your rights under the GDPR.
legal-gdpr-legal-basis-text: We process your personal data based on the following legal grounds:
legal-gdpr-retention-text: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, or as required by law. Contact form submissions are retained for up to 12 months. Client project data is retained for the duration of the contract and up to 5 years thereafter for legal purposes.
legal-gdpr-right-access: Right of access - you can request a copy of your personal data
legal-gdpr-right-erasure: Right to erasure - you can request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten")
legal-gdpr-right-object: Right to object - you can object to processing based on legitimate interest
legal-gdpr-right-portability: Right to data portability - you can request your data in a machine-readable format
legal-gdpr-right-rectification: Right to rectification - you can request correction of inaccurate data
legal-gdpr-right-restrict: Right to restriction - you can request limitation of data processing
legal-gdpr-rights-text: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
legal-gdpr-transfers-text: Your data is primarily stored and processed within the European Economic Area (EEA). If we transfer data outside the EEA, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, such as Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission.
legal-privacy-contact-text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy{'@'}nucleify.io or write to Atomic IT sp. z o.o., ul. Gospodarcza 24/25, 20-213 Lublin, Poland.
legal-privacy-data-collection-text: We may collect the following types of personal information:
legal-privacy-data-name: Name and contact details (when you fill out a contact form)
legal-privacy-data-usage: Usage data (pages visited, time spent, browser type)
legal-privacy-intro-text: At Nucleify (operated by Atomic IT sp. z o.o.), we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information when you visit our website or use our services.
legal-privacy-rights-text: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You may also withdraw your consent to data processing or request data portability. To exercise these rights, please contact us at the email address provided below.
legal-privacy-security-text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
legal-privacy-sharing-text: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your data with trusted service providers who assist us in operating our website and conducting our business, provided they agree to keep this information confidential.
legal-privacy-usage-text: We use the information we collect to provide and improve our services, respond to your inquiries, send you relevant updates (with your consent), ensure the security of our website, and comply with legal obligations.
legal-terms-accounts-text: When you create an account with us, you are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
legal-terms-changes-text: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes by posting the new terms on our website. Your continued use of our services after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
legal-terms-contact-text: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at legal{'@'}nucleify.io or write to Atomic IT sp. z o.o., ul. Gospodarcza 24/25, 20-213 Lublin, Poland.
legal-terms-intro-text: By accessing and using the Nucleify website and services provided by Atomic IT sp. z o.o., you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
legal-terms-ip-text: All content, designs, code, and materials on the Nucleify website are the intellectual property of Atomic IT sp. z o.o. unless otherwise stated. Upon completion and full payment of a project, clients receive full ownership rights to their custom website as outlined in their contract.
legal-terms-liability-text: Nucleify and Atomic IT sp. z o.o. shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by the client for the specific service in question.
legal-terms-services-text: Nucleify provides web design, development, and related digital services. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of our services at any time with reasonable notice to affected clients.
legal-terms-termination-text: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend access to our services at any time, without prior notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms of Service or is harmful to other users, us, or third parties.
notifications-account-updates-desc: Receive emails about account activity and security
notifications-comments-desc: Notify when someone comments on your content
notifications-push-enable-desc: Receive real-time push notifications in your browser
notifications-updates-desc: Notify about system updates and new features
notifications-weekly-digest-desc: Get a weekly summary of your activity
offer-subtitle: From simple landing pages to enterprise platforms - choose the plan that fits your ambition.
pricing-contract-note: Monthly plans require a minimum 6-month commitment.
pricing-description: Flexible pricing that scales with your needs. No hidden fees.
process-guarantee-moneyback-desc: If you're not happy with the result, we'll refund your money. No questions asked, no fine print.
process-guarantee-ownership-desc: After the project is complete, you get full ownership rights. No vendor lock-in, no subscriptions.
process-guarantee-revisions-desc: Revisions during the project are included in the price. We work until you're fully satisfied.
process-guarantee-transparent-desc: The quote amount = the invoice amount. No hidden fees, extra charges, or surprises.
process-guarantees-description: Your money and time are safe. Here's what we guarantee with every project.
process-start-subtitle: Every project follows a transparent, proven process. You know exactly what's happening at each stage - no surprises, just results.
process-step-1-desc: We start with a conversation. We learn about your business, goals, and expectations. Together we determine what you need and what budget works for you.
process-step-1-detail-2: Analysis of your industry and competitors
process-step-2-desc: We create a visual design of your website. You see exactly how it will look before we write a single line of code. We iterate until you're 100% satisfied.
process-step-2-detail-2: Color palette, typography, and style selection
process-step-2-detail-3: Unlimited revisions at the design stage
process-step-3-desc: We turn the approved design into a working website. We test on all devices and browsers. You get a live preview so you can track progress.
process-step-4-desc: We publish your website and make sure everything works perfectly. We don't disappear - we stay with you for technical support and updates.
process-steps-description: We don't overcomplicate things. Our process is simple, transparent, and proven across dozens of projects.
profile-2fa-desc: Add an extra layer of security
profile-delete-confirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
results-benefit-control-desc: Update your site anytime, by yourself
results-benefit-reach-desc: Customers find you on any device
results-benefit-trust-desc: Secure site that loads in a blink
results-cta-description: Free consultation, no strings attached. Let's talk about your project.
results-description: No hidden fees. No complicated contracts. Just a website that works for your business.
service-bw-benefit-credibility-desc: A professional website instantly builds trust and positions your business as a serious player.
service-bw-benefit-customers-desc: Be found on Google. A well-designed site brings new customers directly to your door.
service-bw-benefit-growth-desc: Convert visitors into leads and customers with strategic design and clear calls to action.
service-bw-feat-analytics-desc: Google Analytics integration so you can track visitors, understand behavior, and make data-driven decisions.
service-bw-feat-cms-desc: Easy-to-use admin panel lets you update text, images, and content without any technical knowledge.
service-bw-feat-design-desc: Unique, branded design that reflects your business identity and impresses visitors from the first second.
service-bw-feat-responsive-desc: Looks and works perfectly on every device - phones, tablets, and desktops. No compromises.
service-bw-feat-security-desc: HTTPS encryption, secure forms, and regular updates keep your website and visitors safe.
service-bw-feat-speed-desc: Optimized for speed with modern technologies. Your site loads in under a second.
service-bw-scope-desc: No hidden extras. Every business website we build comes with a complete set of features ready to go from day one.
service-bw-step-1-desc: We learn about your business, goals, and competition.
service-bw-step-2-desc: You see mockups and approve the visual direction.
service-bw-step-3-desc: We build, test, and optimize your website.
service-bw-step-4-desc: We go live and provide ongoing support.
service-bw-subtitle: Your website is your digital storefront. We create modern, fast, and professional websites that build trust with your customers and help you stand out from the competition.
service-cp-benefit-ownership-desc: Full source code ownership. No vendor lock-in, no monthly platform fees, no surprises.
service-cp-benefit-scale-desc: Architecture that grows with you. From 100 users to 100,000 without starting over.
service-cp-benefit-unique-desc: No compromises. Your application does exactly what your business needs - nothing more, nothing less.
service-cp-feat-api-desc: Connect with third-party services, payment gateways, CRMs, and any external system you need.
service-cp-feat-database-desc: Database structure designed for your specific data model with optimized queries and relations.
service-cp-feat-deploy-desc: Deployed on modern cloud infrastructure with CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, and automatic scaling.
service-cp-feat-scalable-desc: Built to grow with your business. Handle more users, data, and features without rebuilding.
service-cp-feat-tailored-desc: Every feature built from scratch to match your exact workflow and business requirements.
service-cp-feat-testing-desc: Unit tests, integration tests, and E2E tests ensure everything works reliably in production.
service-cp-phase-1-desc: We analyze your requirements, define the scope, and create a detailed project roadmap.
service-cp-phase-2-desc: Interactive prototypes and UI/UX design for every screen and user flow.
service-cp-phase-3-desc: Agile development with regular demos. Fully tested with automated test suites.
service-cp-phase-4-desc: Production deployment with monitoring, plus ongoing technical support and updates.
service-cp-subtitle: When off-the-shelf doesn't cut it, we build custom web applications tailored to your unique business requirements. From internal tools to SaaS platforms.
service-ec-benefit-247-desc: Your store never closes. Customers can browse and buy anytime, anywhere in the world.
service-ec-benefit-global-desc: Reach customers beyond your local area. Multi-language and multi-currency support available.
service-ec-benefit-scale-desc: Start small and grow. Add products, categories, and features as your business expands.
service-ec-feat-analytics-desc: Track revenue, conversion rates, and best-selling products with built-in dashboards.
service-ec-feat-catalog-desc: Beautiful product pages with categories, filters, variants, and high-quality image galleries.
service-ec-feat-inventory-desc: Track stock levels, manage variants, and get alerts when products are running low.
service-ec-feat-notifications-desc: Automatic email notifications for order confirmations, shipping updates, and more.
service-ec-feat-payments-desc: Stripe, PayPal, and bank transfer integration. PCI-compliant checkout your customers can trust.
service-ec-feat-responsive-desc: Optimized mobile experience - over 70% of online shopping happens on phones.
service-ec-subtitle: Launch your online store with everything you need - product management, secure payments, and a shopping experience your customers will love.
service-lp-benefit-convert-desc: Focused pages with one clear CTA convert 2-5x better than generic website pages.
service-lp-benefit-launch-desc: Go from idea to live page in just 5 days. Perfect for campaigns and product launches.
service-lp-benefit-test-desc: Validate your offer quickly. Measure interest before investing in a full website.
service-lp-day-1-desc: We define your audience, goal, and key messaging for maximum impact.
service-lp-day-2-desc: Page structure and persuasive content that guides visitors to action.
service-lp-day-3-desc: High-fidelity mockup with your brand colors, imagery, and animations.
service-lp-day-4-desc: Pixel-perfect build with responsive layout and blazing fast performance.
service-lp-day-5-desc: Cross-browser testing, analytics setup, and live deployment.
service-lp-feat-animations-desc: Subtle, professional animations that capture attention and guide the eye to key content.
service-lp-feat-conversion-desc: Every element strategically placed to guide visitors toward taking action. Proven layouts that work.
service-lp-feat-forms-desc: Smart forms that collect the right information without overwhelming your visitors.
service-lp-feat-seo-desc: Structured data, meta tags, and performance optimization for maximum search visibility.
service-lp-feat-speed-desc: Sub-second load times. Fast pages convert better and rank higher on Google.
service-lp-feat-testing-desc: Easily test different headlines, CTAs, and layouts to find what converts best for your audience.
service-lp-subtitle: A single, focused page designed with one goal in mind - converting visitors into leads and customers. Fast to build, easy to test, proven to work.
service-main-bw-desc: Professional websites that build credibility and attract new customers to your business.
service-main-cp-desc: Tailored web applications and platforms built to your exact specifications and needs.
service-main-ec-desc: Online stores with secure payments, inventory management, and seamless shopping experience.
service-main-lp-desc: Conversion-focused pages designed to turn visitors into leads and customers fast.
service-main-subtitle: From simple landing pages to complex e-commerce platforms - we build digital solutions that drive real results for your business.
service-main-wr-desc: Modernize your existing website with fresh design, better performance, and improved SEO.
service-wr-area-mobile-desc: Responsive design tested on all devices and screen sizes.
service-wr-area-security-desc: SSL, headers, CSP policies, and regular vulnerability scanning.
service-wr-area-seo-desc: Structured data, meta optimization, and content strategy for search engines.
service-wr-area-speed-desc: Optimized assets, modern code, and CDN for sub-second load times.
service-wr-benefit-faster-desc: Speed matters. Every second of load time costs you visitors and potential customers.
service-wr-benefit-modern-desc: Visitors judge your business in 0.05 seconds. A modern design builds instant trust.
service-wr-benefit-ranking-desc: Google favors fast, mobile-friendly, and well-structured sites. A redesign boosts your visibility.
service-wr-feat-design-desc: A fresh, contemporary design that aligns with current trends and makes your brand look professional.
service-wr-feat-migration-desc: We carefully move all your existing content, images, and data to the new design without losing anything.
service-wr-feat-performance-desc: Optimized code, compressed assets, and modern infrastructure for dramatically faster load times.
service-wr-feat-responsive-desc: Full mobile optimization so your site looks and works perfectly on every screen size.
service-wr-feat-security-desc: Modern security practices, SSL certificates, and regular updates to protect your site and visitors.
service-wr-feat-seo-desc: Restructured content, proper meta tags, and technical SEO to improve your Google rankings.
service-wr-subtitle: Your website looks outdated? Loads slowly? Doesn't show up on Google? We'll transform it into a modern, fast, and effective tool that works for your business.
thank-you-message: Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you within 8 hours.
toast-image-too-large: Image is too large. Maximum allowed size is 15MB.
toast-name-email-required: First name and email are required.
toast-unsupported-file-type: Unsupported file type. Use PNG, JPEG, GIF or WEBP.
